form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, 2nd of 8 at Canberra Cl1-Sw on April 3 over 1600m, slow going 1.75 len behind Angel City with 55kg at $3.50. Shows ability and expected to improve. Sound debut and sure to be thereabouts in this stronger contest.

form.formComment: First starter by Yes Yes Yes - November Rain. Hasn't set the track alight with his trials leading into today's race. Well held in recent trials and prefer to see.
